    "Coupling gap is out of specification during the alignment process."

  "actions": [
    "Stop alignment work.",
    "Adjust the axial position of the movable machine to bring the coupling gap within the engineered drawing and manufacturer specifications before proceeding with final laser alignment."

  "rationale": "According to API 686 and standard laser alignment procedures, the coupling gap (axial spacing) must be set within specified tolerances before final angular and offset alignment can be completed. Proceeding with alignment while the gap is out of spec violates the correct installation sequence and can lead to equipment damage or incorrect readings.",
